tagline: Find it. Eat it. Love it.
hero_headline:
Scan the menu.
Discover the dish.
hero_sub: FindFood turns any restaurant menu into a photo-first discovery feed — rated by real diners.
step1_desc: Point the camera at any QR menu or take a photo of the paper menu. Every dish is imported automatically.
step2_desc: Browse dishes with real photos and reviews. Find the most-upvoted item before you even sit down.
step3_desc: Photograph your meal, leave a review, and help others find the best food in the city.
live_feed_sub: Voted up by real diners in the community
not_found_desc: The dish or restaurant you're looking for doesn't exist.
